body:
Good morning, Alexandria Friends! Happy Wednesday!

Ya girl was up late last night, but got to spend some time with my chosen sister, who I never get to see enough of, since she’s always super busy. So we’ll see if my muse will fight through the eepies so I have some new fic to share with you.

Today looks to be work and dashing and maybe I’ll see if I can get a nap in there somehow.

I hope you all have a wonderful day and I’ll see you around! 🖤🖤🖤
